_readme: Contract for config/doc_capture (issue #110). Per feature: description/title feed the README block; source_globs drive input-hash idempotency; reach/wait drive navigation; mask is REQUIRED — an entry without mask selectors is refused, never captured raw. input_hash/captured_at/files are engine-maintained.

reporting.title: 📊 Reporting
reporting.description: Daily-numbers pipeline: pulls the day's metrics from the social APIs into Supabase, syncs Notion, and posts the Substack followers Note. Date picker, skip-Substack and debug toggles, and the live streamed log panel.

editorial.title: 📅 Editorial
editorial.description: Seeds the Notion editorial calendar: adds any missing day-rows (day · date · DoW) for the current + next calendar month. Idempotent — re-running only fills gaps.

planning.title: 📅 Planning
planning.description: Weekly content scheduler: walks every WIP-* row in the Notion editorial DB across LinkedIn, Instagram (story + post), Twitter, Threads and the weekly video clip — dry-run or live, with per-platform skip toggles.

newsletter.title: 📰 Newsletter
newsletter.description: Weekly newsletter pipeline: bootstrap the dedicated Chrome, archive the open article tabs into Notion, normalize author names + URLs, and build the HTML issue — each step runnable alone or chained.

engagement.title: 🛡️ Engagement
engagement.description: LinkedIn comment triage: scrape the comments on your recent posts, classify each as human / AI / unknown, and review the queues — canned acknowledgements are staged for copy-paste, never auto-sent.
